emails.subject: Tim Whyte
emails.body: Kevin How do you want to proceed with Tim Whyte? Let me know what I need to do. Thanks. John D. Suarez Enron Broadband Services (713) 853-5267 work (713) 443-5267 mobile (877) 597-0646 pager email: john.suarez@enron.com

emails.subject: RE: Tim Whyte
emails.body: RE: Tim Whyte Get him in the door. Work with Kim Melodick in HR to make it happen. To: Presto, Kevin M.

emails.subject: RE: Tim Whyte
emails.body: Looks fine. You need to start learning. Work with Kim. To: Presto, Kevin M.
